title: Hamilton Beach Custom Grind Electric Coffee Grinder for 4-14 Cups, One-Press Hand-Free Operation with Auto Shutoff, Removable Grinding Bowl For Easy Pour and Clean, Stainless Steel (80406)
description:
About this item
EASILY SELECT GRIND SIZE AND CUPS OF BREWED COFFEE: Whether you need a fine grind size for espresso or a coarse grind for French press, we've got you covered. Just turn the grinder's adjustable selection ring. Grinds enough to brew 4-14 cups.
GRIND COFFEE HANDS-FREE OR MANUALLY: Convenient push-down operation allows you to activate the grinder with one press. It grinds coffee while sitting stably on the countertop and shuts off automatically. Or hold down to manually control coffee texture.
EASY TO POUR & CLEAN WITH REMOVABLE BOWL: Because the bowl removes, it's easy to fill with coffee beans and to pour coffee into your coffee maker after grinding. The bowl is designed with durable stainless steel and is dishwasher safe.
DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL PARTS: The electric coffee bean grinder has durable stainless steel grinding bowl and blades for long-lasting performance.
GREAT FOR HERBS AND SPICES: With durable stainless steel blades, this coffee grinder makes easy work of grinding everything from coffee beans to herbs, spices and seeds.
reviews_5s:
The grinder works very well🤩. I always read reviews and this product lived up to the hype it was giving. It feels sturdy, with a convenient cord collection on the bottom for easy storage.

I also like the one touch setting which grinds the beans to desired set consistency to then stops. This item was also a more budget friendly option that doesn’t give you buyers regret. The interior bowl is easy to remove for convenience and makes clean up a breeze, I am happy I choose this one.The directions were easy & logical. The pictorial cues on the unit make it easy to adjust for various grinds without having to refer to the directions more than once. It is so easy, I can hand it to my adult son, point out a few things & he’s in business first time out & done in a pinch. It is easy to clean but very sharp. I use a basting brush to sweep out coffee dust & then rinse it out. It is compact, cord tucks away & easily fits in a drawer. Since my old HB grinder lasted 20 years, bet this one could too, & it didn’t cost a whole lot more than my old one.I had a 25 or old GE one touch coffee grinder that finally died. I bought a battery grinder. It didn't last a year before it stopped working. I decided to go back to the plug in. After searching quite awhile I stumbled across this Hamilton beach. My last one , the grinding cup couldn't be removed, but this one can. It has that one touch grinder and adjustable griding. My last one had a cord but it was hidden. This winds up in the bottom but not like the last one. Considering the improvements, I can deal with the cord. It is also quieter. I just hope this one lasts as long as my last one.The first one I received looked like it was a returned item. The plastic teeth of the cover were broken and the inside looked stained. I was able to return the item and within a week received a new item. It runs efficiently and is extremely quiet. Very good item.I have used this one time and it appears to work well. It does take a few minutes to grind the coffee since the grinder cup is fairly small.Love This!!! It's small but mighty, takes up hardly any space, the cord can wrap up inside the bottom out of the way, a removable stainless steel cup for easy cleaning, so easy to use just push down on the top. Turned air dried chili peppers into a fine powder for seasonings. And the same for pumpkin seeds, turned into a fine powder. I think I could have used it a little longer and make pumpkin butter!! I am very happy with this product!!I ordered this Hamilton Beach coffee grinder because I accidentally ordered a bag of coffee beans. I like this model because it's compact with a place to store cord . Easy to use with 3 grind setting which is perfect since I use all three. French Press, Drip and ecpresso. I made French Press coffee and the flavor was perfect, no bitterness. This would make a nice holiday gift for that coffee drinker on your list. Add a coffee press and a bag of coffee beans for the ultimate gift.Would definitely buy again. Love it.I really liked my old Epic grinder, and was saddened when it gave up. I had purchased another foreign branded grinder as an eventual replacement, but that one had shortcomings (too many closures, grind cup wouldn't come out), so that one was relegated to pepper grinding duty. I looked at a lot of potential replacements online, and settled on this HB grinder. It's sweet! Auto timer settings based on amount of coffee beans used, grind cup comes out for easy dumping and cleaning, and the big bonus is it's so much quieter! I'm an early bird, and hate to rattle the house grinding coffee. No problem with this one.Our previous grinder failed so needed a new one. This grinder is great. Beat feature is that you can set the grind level but just press once and it auto grinds and stops vs. others had to hold down to keep grinding. Also this is pretty quiet for a grinder. All in al, we love it!
reviews_1s:
This grinder has three notches on the inside of the top plastic piece to lock into place. While trying to put the lid on, one broke off after a few weeks use, then a 2nd one in about another week. Now it won't work, I guess because the lid doesn't seat properly. I contacted the company and asked them to replace the part and they want $13 to ship me another one, which is absurd. I will probably just buy a different coffee grinder. Before that issue, it worked great.Thought this was a good grinder but after a little use it will not start due to the tab on the lid will not pressing the switch and will not grind. It is junk don't buyonly work well for 5-6 weeks.
Now it's 10 days past return date.
I will not buy a Hamilton Beach product again. Feel cheated that I can't return it.
Wasted money for inferior product.the espresso grind never stops with the auto timer. The machine burns within 5 seconds, and completely stopped working within 3 weeks. Waste of my moneyIt was great for 3 weeks. Then, after a few seconds of grind, it stopped. It repeated this on subsequent attempts. Now nothing.I am disappointed with the Hamilton Beach Custom Grind Electric grinder I purchased. After only five uses, smoke appeared from the base and it stopped working.
Is this the authentic brand?
